summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 Phase 8 - Employer Unlock Experience. All 17 backend pytest tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Payment system works in MOCK MODE (placeholder Razorpay keys) - credits are added directly without real checkout.

Credit Balance Display.Gold-styled credit badge in header: PASS - '60 Credits' displayed with gold gradient

Blurred Contact Info.Phone numbers blurred (CSS blur-[5px]): PASS - 51 locked profiles with blurred phones

Match Score Badge.Match details tooltip shows matched/miss: PASS - Education, English, Experience, Role Category

passed_tests: GET /nextapi/wallet?employer_id=default-employer - Returns balance=84, unlockedCandidates
GET /nextapi/wallet?employer_id=new - Returns balance=0
POST /nextapi/wallet - Adds credits directly
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - 10 credits = 50000 paise with mock=true
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - 25 credits = 100000 paise
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - Invalid credits (7) returns 400
POST /nextapi/payments/create-order - Missing employer_id returns 400
POST /nextapi/payments/verify - Mock=true adds credits directly
POST /nextapi/payments/verify - Credits accumulate correctly
POST /nextapi/unlock - Returns 402 (insufficient_credits) when balance=0
POST /nextapi/unlock - Deducts exactly 1 credit
POST /nextapi/unlock - Returns phone number on success
POST /nextapi/unlock - Already unlocked returns success without deduction
POST /nextapi/unlock - Missing candidateId returns 400
POST /nextapi/unlock - Invalid candidateId returns 404
E2E: Create order -> Verify -> Unlock -> Check balance flow
Jobs have minimum_education, english_level for matching
Candidates have education_level, english_level for matching
UI: Gold credit badge in header displays current balance
UI: Credit balance button opens Buy Credits modal
UI: Buy Credits modal shows 2 packs (10 for ₹500, 25 for ₹1000 Best Value)
UI: Selecting pack and Confirm Buy adds credits in mock mode
UI: Modal closes after successful purchase
UI: Credit balance updates in header after purchase (59→84)
UI: Phone numbers blurred (CSS blur) for locked candidates
UI: Gold '₹50 to Unlock' button with gradient styling
UI: Match score badge appears when job selected ('100% Match')
UI: 'Why?' button opens tooltip with matched/missing fields
UI: Match details tooltip shows green checkmarks for matched fields
UI: Unlock deducts 1 credit (60→59)
UI: Phone revealed after unlock (+91 99887 98420)
UI: Call and WhatsApp buttons visible after unlock
UI: Report No-Show button visible after unlock

mocked_integrations.Razorpay Payment Gateway: MOCKED - Using placeholder keys (rzp_test_PLACEHOLDER). In mock mode, create-order returns mock order ID and verify with mock=true adds credits directly without real payment checkout.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 55 candidates and 25 jobs. Default employer 'default-employer' wallet tested with 84 credits (started with 60, unlocked 1 for 59, purchased 25 for 84).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Phase 8 Employer Unlock Experience fully tested. Backend test file: /app/getlocal/tests/test_phase8_unlock_experience.py. All payment APIs working in MOCK mode (placeholder Razorpay keys). Key verified behaviors:
1. Wallet returns balance and unlockedCandidates array
2. Create order validates credit packs (10/25 only in modal, 50 also available in API)
3. Verify with mock=true adds credits directly
4. Unlock costs exactly 1 credit and returns phone on success
5. Already unlocked candidates don't deduct again
6. Phone numbers have CSS blur for locked profiles
7. Gold unlock button uses gradient from-[#D4A017] to-[#F5C518]
8. Match score badge appears when job is selected with 'Why?' button
9. Match details tooltip shows matched[] (green checkmarks) and missing[] (red X)
